reviews.review_title: best game ever this is perfect.
reviews.review_description: this game named blade & sorcery costs 30$ which is a lot for just a game, BUT i’ve tried many games that cost money but THIS game is something different this game is worth money, i dont even know how this game was free this game the reason i bought a VR because this game is GREAT no other game compare to this game, i know when you first buy the game, its mid, BUT this game gives you the option to put mods into it AND mods are the reason this game is GREAT, WORTH 30$, AND ITS THE REASON ITS THE BEST GAME EVER IN THE WORLD (in my opinion)

Hey, so I was playing B&S (Blade & Sorcery) months ago and randomly it kicked me out of the game not only that, everything went black like I was stuck in the void or something.

Afterwards I tried turning it off,powering it off,etc
But nothing seems to work. I can’t even get into my password screen,and everytime I turn it on it stays stuck on the “Meta horizon OS “ screen and sometimes it vanishes into either a black or grayish background and it stops there. So if u can tell me how to at least fix this that’ll be great.
Ty for reading this.
￼

So the other day I went on my vr to play blade and sorcery it said that there was an update so I decided to download it but then after it downloaded i launched the game and for some reason, the mods were gone and my previous characters were gone too. And when I tried loading up a game of crystal hunt, it said that it would be available in 2022 but the year is 2026 which doesn’t make sense, so I loaded up a sandbox game and realised the home was different, the citadel map was gone, there was less weapons, no armour, less detailed spells and no gore. reviews.review_description:
I absolutely love this game and recommend it to anyone who likes to fight and use powers in VR games but please I am begging the creators of this game to MAKE ANOTHER SPELL I love the three spells to use but I been dying over here hoping the next update has a new power to use or at least new power ups for the original spells just something I love that new weapons are being added but it just feels old without a new powers like ice for example or wind if the creators of blade of sorcery happens to read this review please please PLEASE ADD A NEW SPELL IM BEGGING YOU

reviews.review_title: We need more spells and realism!
reviews.review_description:
I know that Warpfrog is currently working on more weapons and armor, but what about spells? Like let me give you some ideas:
1. Water spell
2. Air spell
3. Earth spell
4. Magic spell

All of these spells could make the game even more fun! And another thing is the body path. Me personally, I like getting up  lose and punching my enemies. Like I wanna be able strangle your enemies for a slow and silent death. And to also be able to snap necks for a quicker death. But honestly I love this game!

Everyone this game is.... INCREDIBLE. Possibly one of the best games on Oculus quest!!!! Please if you have extra money BUY THIS GAME. the only reason I said "but" was cause I wrote a whole (much longer) review for this game and then I accidentally pressed back and it got deleted:( so I'm a little pissed but seriously this is an incredible game and def worth its price and more.

I bought this game about a year after I got my Quest 2 and I had a BLAST! There is no hating in this game. Not on my part. The mods are amazing, the dungeons are fun and the combat is perfect. I highly recommend this game to anyone who is psychotic enough to play it. I love the game. Five stars earned!

Great game vanilla and modded if you want good mods check out nexus and I think they should add vanilla multiplayer and make so enemies don’t die immediately after losing a limb (other than their head ofc) and you should definitely try the nomad rim mod for Star Wars weapons enemies and maps overall though really kool game

Before I say anything if you have a decent computer with steam I’d highly recommend playing this on steam vr for a better experience with less lag, crashes, and better graphics, not that this is game is bad.

 The game is fine and the glitches aren’t too bad, although it would be nice if you could create an option to disable/delete in game quick screenshots due to them being 99% accidental and already having a feature in base meta quest.

Another thing is that late game is too unbalanced. You’re way too powerful and even the strongest armored enemies can be beaten by sprinting into them. Maybe add an enemy that uses the flintlock, or nerf the player as just sprinting naked with the red gem maxed makes you basically guaranteed to win if you aren’t messing around.

Time to edit my review after a couple years
Definitely one of if not my favorite games on vr still
They finally added a story mode which is great
The combat is still probably one of the best I've seen
There's a still a few occasional bugs but I personally find its a lot more polished than before
There's a lot more weapons and abilities in the game now which I absolutely love (one thing they could also add which could be cool could be a scabbard/sheath for some swords which is mostly because it looks cool to be able to properly draw and sheathe it but it could also be used in the other hand to block)
I still love how it does dismemberment and gore quite well (I do wish that it doesn't immediately kill the target if you cut off their hand or arm i feel like it should only insta kill if you cut off the head but that's just my personal opinion)
The main downsides I can really say for the game is no multiplayer and mod support can be quite janky and broken but to be honest thats fine I mostly play vanilla anyway

Blades & Sorcery still has some of the most satisfying melee combat I’ve experienced in VR. Every fight feels brutal and weighty, especially once you start chaining attacks together and mixing weapons with magic.
The magic system is what really elevates it though. Launching enemies across rooms with gravity spells or setting weapons ablaze before charging into combat never really gets old. The physics based combat makes every encounter feel different and gives you a ridiculous amount of freedom in how you approach fights.
If you enjoy sandbox combat with brutal physics and satisfying magic mechanics, Blades & Sorcery is still one of the best VR experiences out there.

this game is my favorite game right now and it has a lot of build in mods you can make your own character so change the hair eyes and more there is story mode and sandbox it is a good game to do wizard stuff it is fun for beginners of vr but it is glitchy only is you get to much mods and you can have 50 mods  at once.

reviews.review_title: This is perfect game when you are bored
reviews.review_description:
🎮 Why Blade & Sorcery Won’t Get You Bored
Blade & Sorcery stays fun because it gives you freedom, creativity, and constant chaos in the best way possible.
Here’s why it keeps players hooked:
🧠 1. Physics-Based Combat Feels Real
Every fight is different. Weapons have weight, enemies react realistically, and your movements actually matter. You’re not button-mashing—you’re physically swinging, blocking, dodging, and reacting in real time.
⚔️ 2. Tons of Weapons & Fighting Styles
Swords, axes, daggers, spears, bows, magic—you can:
Be a dual-wielding berserker
A precise medieval knight
A stealthy assassin
Or a full-on telekinetic wizard
You can even combine magic and melee for crazy combos.
🔥 3. Sandbox Freedom
There’s no strict “right way” to play. Want to:
Throw enemies off cliffs?
Slow time and dodge arrows?
Punch someone while holding a sword in your teeth?
You can.
The freedom makes every session feel unique.
🧩 4. Mods (Huge Replay Value)
The mod community adds:
New maps
Star Wars lightsabers
Guns
Superpowers
New enemies
Mods basically turn it into whatever game you want.
🏰 5. Arena + Dungeon Mode
You can do quick arena waves for fast action, or go through dungeon runs for more adventure-style gameplay with exploration and progression.
💥 The Big Reason
The game feels like being inside an action movie. Because you are physically doing the fighting, it doesn’t feel repetitive the way regular flat-screen games can.
If you like VR and creative combat, it’s the kind of game you can jump into for 20 minutes—or lose 2 hours without noticing.

Now that the newest update came the sentar update there are so many bugs that make the game either crash or not load. Just today when i was playing, my game crashed then when it loaded it back up it got rid of all my progress then it crashed again then it wouldn't load even the main menu.if they fix their game i might come back until then I'm done playing

I myself love blade and sorcery, the game provides fun with action, you can play a kind of campaign mode where you can get gear and sell it and even buy better gear, you can't take gear from the enemies that you can eliminate in more than 100 way you can either come up silent and strike frome behind or you can go up guns blazing, you can get different gear wich really matters because if you want to be silent you need lighter gear but if you want to be well protected in battle try to become a robot and cover yourself with metal, but not only is the game about armor and weapons the other half of the game is sorcery, with the sorcery you can  be a true witch or wizzard with fire you can heat up your blade and melt right through you're enemies armor and I. Sure you know what you can do with electricity, and you can even combine spells, the three main spells are fire electricity and pretty much telekinesis but you can combine spells and if you're really into them you can get a staff and put your spell into it, but B&S has plenty of maps and outposts to clear and to expirement in especially in sandbox you can do almost whatever your heart desires, but Blade & Sorcery isn't just to mess around with what it originally gives you.... well, it is, but the game is made to have fun, MODS tons of em to enhance your gaming experience. The game wants you to use mods, but beware I. The Crystall hunt mode (campaign) mods can decrease your experience of the main game. B&S has much to offer, and I highly recommend that you try it out if you like a lot of action fantasy and violence.

reviews.review_title: The best sword and magic game I played
reviews.review_description: Blade&sorcery is the best game I have ever played on vr it has great magic and weapons you can use in the game but a problem I am having with it is that sometimes when I hit something from a enemy to a object it sometimes glitch/bugs and it will kill the enemy or break the object it’s not smooth and takes the experience away,I have a idea for a update a new crystal that can allow you to control reality some what like the reality stone from the Marvel Cinematic Universe/MCU and one of the abilities will be the you the player can turn invisible but it will take a lot of your focus until you get the full upgrade to the point where it will only take a little bit of your focus I don’t have a idea on what the other abilities/powers the crystal will have except for having the ability to erase people but it should have a down part but it should be at the closed entrance near the beginning of the game and should only be unlocked at the end of the game so that’s my ideas and review so please bring my ideas to the game and fix the glitches and the bugs 🙏🏽. I would be extremely grateful if you listen to me ❤️😁🙂.

I’ve been  playing  blade and sorcery for a while and I’ve joined their discord for modders and I have to say they are beyond disrespectful they are bullies and honestly mods are the best part of the game but seeing how the modders act on discord makes me want to uninstall the game truthfully👎🏾👎🏾👎🏾 👎🏾👎🏾👎🏾👎🏾👎🏾👎🏾👎🏾👎🏾
If I could give no stars I would

This is mainly just a joke, but what if you added soda to the game? But it was blade-and-sorcery-fied so it’s called something like “swigglemans drink.” When you drink it, enemies move slower like the mind crystal thing. Also when you shake it enough, it will start shaking violently and you will be given the option to use the trigger button. When you do this, the cork goes flying out and can hit enemies.

The potential of this game is endless. Endless mods, and the way the boss is never the same fight. New abilities every time. No restrictions because of possible motion sickness. You get the full boss fight experience. It's so cool clinging onto Hector for dear life while he swings you around. It's amazing when you pull off a stealth kill and get that sound that plays. This game is great. I can't wait for Khar-Tib.

This murder simulator before 1.0 was making me feel like a mass murder without a purpose. Now with 1.0 i have a purpose and I don't think that's getting rid of the guilt of committing triple homicide twice and getting away scott free. Cutting someones head off and using their body as a meat shield against helpless human beings just feels so satisfying. And on top of all that, warpfrog has something I forget the name of, so we are getting more updates after the end update like the byeth update, and I'm so hyped. So here are some suggestions: add multiplayer. Add a perk sort of system if the spells don't actually classify as a perk system. With the addition of the new dungeons I would like to see a step up from y'know, the regular old dungeons, like parkour and that stuff. 10/10 game, ending is good, but don't buy if you don't want to commit a mass murder in real life and in game. Also, I cannot wait for the ratka land if we are able to go there, it sounds fun. Mountains and swampy areas sounds like a blast. Edit: i now look at this message and ive realized i should probably head to a mental hospital

I love this game greatly and it is the main game I play in VR, but the most recent update for the game, or oculus 2 has come with a few bugs that make the game near unplayable. 1 my weapons fall out of their slots involuntarily but the game doesn't register that they do leaving the slot locked for other weapons. 2 this May be happening to the bots as well because they are spawning without any weapons so they just despawn as if they're retreating. This makes playing any mode other than endless impossible , for you can set yourself up to fight 20 to 30 enemies and only fight 10 because the rest respawn. please warp frog i love your game and i'd love to keep playing it but right now it is currently unplayable for me. Thank you!

When I first got it, really my only issue was climbing. I thought that climbing was crap, specifically climbing ropes because I kept sliding down them, but I learned on my own that I was climbing wrong. I learned that I had to use the bottom triggers to climb the rope instead of sliding down the rope. Now that I got that down, I love this game now, 0 problems.

I have played blade and sorcery for quite a while but there is 1 thing that bothers me, if people lose/break their controllers and cant afford new ones we can no longer play so i say you add hand tracking making 1:your playerbase larger 2:more publicity with a huge update like so and 3:much more love to this game.

reviews.review_title: Good but it has a couple problems
reviews.review_description:
1: the hitbox when you're dueling it's like you can block perfectly at the coordinates and you still get hit even your hand doesn't have to be in the way 
2: self collision is too unrealistic it's like even though you did not hit yourself the game register you as hitting yourself 
3: the movement is a pain to adapt to

Blade & sorcery is an amazing game if you like physical combat by games this is for you. If you like swords use a sword, like magic? Use gravity, fire, and etc this game has it all. It has great optimisation with the gore and controls in my opinion. But there’s one thing that lacks for me is not ENOUGH gore, I’m a guy who likes blood for some reason but there’s not enough stuff that the blood and dismembering can do I know it’s vr hard to update the games but for us fellows who doesn’t like mods and likes vanilla it’s not the greatest thing in the world. Non the less great game

reviews.review_title: Good game but it needs multiplayer
reviews.review_description:
The combat is very good in this game and the built-in mod menu is very easy to use it just needs to have built-in multiplayer to where you don't have to install a multiplayer mod this would fix so many problems and if they ever do add multiplayer they need to make it to where you can see other people's mods also newer updates usually break all the mods like until they update it.
SO PLEASE GIVE US MULTIPLAYER.

reviews.review_title: READ!!! This game is a master piece
reviews.review_description: I have had this game for over a year now. I have had a few minor bugs here and there, but It is a great game minimal bugs, great updates, and tons mods. To all the people who say this a bad game or tons of bugs etc. You either have too many mods installed or you don't have enough storage for mods. Also this game is a very good stress reliever and workout game. So i highly recommend it to everyone, hope this review helped.😁

You need to lower the price 5 bucks but that's all I can complain about you also need something to track how much mods you have and it tells you if you would lag because all the mods but it vary good 💯😊💯

reviews.review_title: I only bought for the mods
reviews.review_description:
Old review: This game is awful I only bought it for the mods and I spent 2h trying to get them to download and work watching many tutorials, so now it is too late to refund. Wasted £25

New: It’s been like 2 months this game is so good for the mods originally it was clunky but I know how to use everything the mods are great though I never play crystal hunt as the NPCs are too easy to defeat, though the powers you unlock are great and polished.If you like mods get this game but I wouldn’t recommend if you want a good story game.

I don’t know it’s because if I bad Internet, but they just deleted all my progress I needed 6 GB while I had 4.1 and all I did was go off into another tab for one minute and it. It just deleted all my progress last time it happened. I could’ve got it back but this time it’s gonna take me for f ing ever. I hate my life. Please fix this. If you don’t I’ll be officially hating on this game for the rest of my life.
￼

reviews.review_title: This is the game I played the most by fa
reviews.review_description:
r. 

Blade and Sorcery is one of my first purchases and this is the only game I play still. It has that unique je ne sais qoi, that makes this game rise above others. 
The possibilities of this game is almost endless - and if we add the mods, they do become endless. Hail the Khemeneth!

i’d give it five stars if i didn’t spend hours just for the ending to be a cutscene with no extra content. I am pissed that i spend almost an hour getting to the boss, just for my stupid 
lightning crystal DESPAWNING. I’m so mad at that. Please for the love of god, make a patch that forces crystals into inventory after a bossfight. FOR THE LOVE OF GOD.

I spent my money on this fire game, I love the fact that it has its own menu to download mods. Just one problem though, the game needs multiplayer. I know a lot of problems may occur, but I think it would be much cooler. Especially if it's co-op for less bugs

This game is just SO PEAK, and the mods are PERFECT. I don't even know how to describe on how this game was worth the $30, it was just simply beautiful down to the core, all of the adventure, the maps, the weapons. I have never felt so happy in my life before. I just love killing civilians and the story. This definitely makes the best game in my whole library, 5 stars.

reviews.review_title: SO GODAM GOOD THIS IS MY 1ST REVIEW
reviews.review_description: THIS GAME MIGHT BE MY FIRST GOOD PAID GAME, AND THE STORY IS SO FUN TO PLAY THROUGH(and graphics for a standalone are immaculate) THIS GAME TEACH ME MODDING. LIKE ALMOST TO EVERY GAME

Edit: After revisiting the game, it seems like the updates have made the game worse somehow, the graphics seem better, but the performance drop is noticeable, the combat feels clunky and buggy, the NPCs are super buggy with collision physics and the AI also seems to be downgraded. I miss the silky smooth gameplay and hopefully that returns in a future update. Regardless still a 10/10 game. 

By far the greatest VR game I could have imagined. I have at least 3k hours in this game and I cannot get enough of it. The updates, the mods, the possibilities are endless. It truely brought a childhood dream of mine to life to use sick powers and bada$$ weapons to endlessly obliterate people to death. Thank you Warpfrog!
One of the best games I've played in vr by far it has every single thing you need the mods are very good but hard to find sometimes. The sandbox is so good and fun to play.

The game is very beautiful, but the blood is unrealistic and the quality is a bit bad. I hope this is fixed. Also, if I add more than 3 mods, the game freezes, but it is very excellent. Honestly, it's overpriced, but it's fantastic and deserves 3 to 4 stars.

This is my opinion!!!! 
I beat the story and it was confusing(I didn't read the books...) 
But it was still good. 
Sandbox is SOOOO fun(if you make it fun) 
Even better is the mods. Bored? Mods. Repetitive? Mods. The only thing I want is MULTIPLAYER!!!! The mods for multiplayer are only. Okay

Everything started off fine but after like a month and I try to make a new character I put my exact height and I'm  floating in the game and when I turn on height offset my knees are bent and I'm so short so if there are any devs reading this pls fix it this was my favorite game

The Baron is probably the nicest game dev I could think of, and his game has a nice story. I may sound ai, but that’s because I just like blade and sorcery so much. I started in U12, so I’m a late starter, but 1.0 was probably the greatest thing to happen to this game. Has great mods as well, my favorite is probably carnage reborn, but I do wish they kept the original Market map.

reviews.review_title: Problem aProblem about old version refix
reviews.review_description: So I tried re-fixing my blade and sorceries game so I tried fixing it by clicking a different file, but that made me go to the older version but how do you go back to your own version which is the brand new one? I love this game, but I just want to refix this can someone please help me with this ￼thank you
I love the game and the idea, but there needs to be more monsters instead of killing only humans. Also every boss fight is the same. They also need to add multi-player.

I love this game a lot. It is super fun to play, and it has a sandbox mode and story mode! But if there was one thing I could add it would be multiplayer! Please please please add multiplayer. Overall this game is awesome and I can’t wait to see how this game can improve and update!

Im an og. ive been playing since there wasn't even an outside world to explore and all there was was the shack. it was amazing watching the game and it's mods evolve and gameplay was so fun throughout the years. with final update coming soon i can't wait but im sad to see production stop, this is a truely great game that i enjoyed. I recommend this game, its great without mods but sometimes better with mods. Thank you warpfrog.

Amazing game I would go as far as to say it’s the best game in many countries. For example it’s great par-core mechanics make it a candidate for best vr par-core game, another and most obvious best mechanic is it immersive combat, it’s moding completely really is the chary on the Top making anything possible.

So when I look at the mods in the mods menu, it doesn’t say there’s anything there even though I had already downloaded mods. I tried deleting and reinstalling the app but there’s something wrong with the mods menu. I hope one of the devs can fix this cause I really like this game.
This game has the best combat in any vr game the graphics are great the maps are great the story is a bit boring. But when the game gets multiplayer this will be greatest game ever
The game is 10/10 great game and fun to play and blow off steam but the hit registration on hector ￼with the wrist blades are horrible especially on his chest crystals
This game killed my headset by overloading it now I can't even use it and had to factory reset it and it won't pair to the app.

I just like kicking the s### out of people

I just thought of a way to get down a cliff is by putting a knife in the soft surface of the wall ,wood and more and slowly slide down the surface it might not be added but it would be awesome to do it

This game is amazing and I love the content but I wish the enemies were a little harder or attacked faster and blocking could be a little better and the campaign could be a little more diversified in maps, rewards, magic ect but keep up the good work this game is awesome 👍

EPIC GAME!! I only got it because of the mods but then I played through without any of the mods and holy $#!+ what an epic adventure that took days of playing here and there.  
Im even making videos for YouTube.

https://youtu.be/QF3QGlLzlvg?si=u0q3KzeQyCWleeN_

This game has been glitchy AF ever since the pirate update. I start a challenge and my clothes fall off, opponents fall through environments,its been a chore to play. Please fix. Don't even really play this anymore due to the really rough gameplay.

This is definitely one of the best games I own and I can’t for more but I do think that they should add a mod menu and hear me out but they should add chickens to your home in the u 11 or at least the ability to spawn them.

reviews.review_title: Blade and sorcery is so good!
reviews.review_description: Blade and sorcery allows you to be creative and do anything with a variety of mods, weapons,maps etc. I bought this game because I saw it in a video and when I played jt the game was so much better than expected. If you’re looking for a game choose this one!

I love how there is multiple player and I love all the mods thank you for making this game I was so bored because there was nothing good on the vr until I saw a video of people playing it and I started playing it to it's really fun if you don't have the game yoh should buy it

This is one of the best games I've ever played, it has thrill, gore, and so much more. It would've been 3 stars if it didn't have mods. The fact that you can always download thousands of mods is wild. The price for this game is reasonable for the graphics and game play. And it also has a sandbox mode so you can do whatever you want. Just one more thing. MULTIPLY PLAYER PLEASEEE

Js so yk if you get a bunch of mods it will break the game easily so only have like five enabled if your on standalone. 
Also there is many bad reviews because they broke the game with mods
Its a great game but it is laggy at some times but if 6 stars was possible i would rate it 6 for blood dripping
I could play this for hours on end without mods but with them it’s genuinely even more play time so overall this game genuinely is amazing nothing ever has kept me playing till 3AM
